description: Retrieval smoke set (Phase C2 acceptance, SOTERIA_CHAT_KB_PLAN.md). Each question must surface the expected section within the top matches. Starter set — the SME golden set (~150–200 questions, Phase C6) grows from here.

questions.q: When is a written lockout tagout program required?
What must a hazard communication program include for safety data sheets?
Is a medical evaluation required before an employee wears a respirator?
How often must portable fire extinguishers be inspected?
Which small employers are exempt from OSHA injury and illness recordkeeping?
How soon must a work-related fatality be reported to OSHA?
What is required before entering a permit-required confined space?
At what height is fall protection required on a construction site?
What protective systems are required for trench and excavation work?
How much weight must a scaffold support relative to its intended load?
What must an exposure control plan for bloodborne pathogens contain?
What training is required for forklift operators?
When is machine guarding required at the point of operation?
When are quick drenching eyewash facilities required?
At what noise level must a hearing conservation program begin?
What are the requirements for working on deenergized electrical parts?
May an OSHA compliance officer enter a workplace to inspect it?
What fire precautions apply to welding and cutting in shipyards?
What is the permissible exposure limit for asbestos in general industry?
What must an emergency action plan include?
